"'''Dark Soul'''" is a short story by [[August Hahn|August]] and [[Cynthia Hahn]], released online on [[September 22]], [[2005]], as part of the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|''Living Force'']] setting from [[Wizards of the Coast]]. It describes the [[Battle of Kromus/Legends|Battle of Kromus]], within the story-arc of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]].
